name: Channel ROAS
description: Track ROAS by channel against configured targets, refreshed daily. One governed definition replaces the three different ROAS numbers leadership keeps citing from three different places.
alsoSurfaces: What is our blended and per-channel ROAS right now?
Which channels are below target, and by how much?
How is ROAS trending over the last 30 days?
Where is most of our spend concentrated relative to ROAS?
beforeWeRun: ROAS variant: pipeline ROAS, revenue ROAS, or both?
ROAS target: tenant config per channel, or 3.0x blended fallback?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline ROAS
whatYoullGet.desc: Blended ROAS as a big number with target indicator and health-band coloring.

whatYoullGet.name: Per-channel ROAS
whatYoullGet.desc: Bar chart with health bands and a target-line overlay per channel.

whatYoullGet.name: Spend share
whatYoullGet.desc: Donut chart of spend allocation by channel.

whatYoullGet.name: Underperforming channels
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of channels in the red band with magnitude and recommended action.

whatYoullGet.name: Channel detail table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table: spend, attributed pipeline/revenue, ROAS, target, health, deltas.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your channel-ROAS dashboard in ~8 min.
